description: Backend-dev engine lifecycle hooks. Architecture-first, prompt-only.

hooks.prompt:
DOMAIN: backend-dev
IF task involves: API design, database schema, REST/GraphQL endpoints, concurrency, async workers, messaging queues, microservice boundaries, or backend architecture
THEN: Read ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/SKILL.md before responding. Classify into one primary surface: api-design, database-architecture, concurrency-async, messaging, or service-topology.
RATIONALE: Database schema must be sound before routes exist. API contracts must be defined before implementation.
IF_SKIP: Risk building on an unsound data model or leaking business logic into controllers.

VERIFY: If this session involved API or database design, did the response enforce database-first ordering and idempotent mutations?
IF_NO: Continue and consult ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/references/database-architecture.md and ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/references/api-design.md before completing.
